name: byeloff/thronekit
description: Laravel + React + Inertia starter kit with Auth, i18n, LGPD/GDPR compliance, and WebSocket notifications.

suggest.spatie/laravel-activitylog: Required for the Compliance module (audit trail).
suggest.spatie/laravel-cookie-consent: Required for the Compliance module (cookie banner).
suggest.spatie/laravel-personal-data-export: Required for the Compliance module (GDPR data export).
suggest.laravel/reverb: Required for the Notifications module (WebSocket server).
suggest.laravel/scout: Required for full-text search on Users.
